'''âk-r-h-dh''' ('''kakarhedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quenelle|quenelle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quenelle|quenelle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-r-h-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kakarhedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thikarhedhoko || jikarhedhoko || shikarhedhoko || kikarhedhoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthukarhedhoko || jujukarhedhoko || shushukarhedhoko || kukukarhedhoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thukarhedhoko || jukarhedhoko || shukarhedhoko || kukarhedhoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thukarhedhoko || jukarhedhoko || shukarhedhoko || kukarhedhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thekarhedhoko || jekarhedhoko || shekarhedhoko || kekarhedhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothokarhedhoko || jojokarhedhoko || shoshokarhedhoko || kokokarhedhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thokarhedhoko || jokarhedhoko || shokarhedhoko || kokarhedhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thokarhedhoko || jokarhedhoko || shokarhedhoko || kokarhedhoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || karhedhoko || karhedhoko || karhedhoko || karhedhoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || karhedhoko || karhedhoko || karhedhoko || karhedhoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || karhedhoko || karhedhoko || karhedhoko || karhedhoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || karhedhoko || karhedhoko || karhedhoko || karhedhoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠkarhedhoko || jĂŠkarhedhoko || shĂŠkarhedhoko || kĂŠkarhedhoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathakarhedhoko || jajakarhedhoko || shashakarhedhoko || kakakarhedhoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thakarhedhoko || jakarhedhoko || shakarhedhoko || kakarhedhoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thakarhedhoko || jakarhedhoko || shakarhedhoko || kakarhedhoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shakarhedhithi || shakarhedhiji || shakarhedhishi || shakarhedhiki
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || shakarhedhĂŠthĂŠ || shakarhedhĂŠjĂŠ || shakarhedhĂŠshĂŠ || shakarhedhĂŠkĂŠ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || shakarhedhatha || shakarhedhaja || shakarhedhasha || shakarhedhaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || shakarhedhatha || shakarhedhaja || shakarhedhasha || shakarhedhaka
|-

|}
